name: oneui-marketplace
description: One UI / JDS design-system coding plugin for Claude Code (and Cursor) — knowledge, the validate_oneui_code gate, and Figma → code for React web + React Native. Internal distribution; the @jds4/* runtime packages live on the private JIO-DS-ONE-UI Azure DevOps feed.

plugins.name: oneui
plugins.description: Build OneUI-compliant React (web) and React Native apps from a PRD or a Figma frame. Bundles the @jds4/oneui-mcp server (23 tools: offline knowledge snapshot, component catalogs, brand tokens, validate_oneui_code, figma_to_code), 5 agent-native skills, 6 slash commands, and an advisory PostToolUse validator hook. Every output is certified against the installed component API.
